memoryArtifacts.headline: Rawleigh TRAVERS LAND GRANT 9 March 1653
memoryArtifacts.description:
Land grant 9 March 1653.
Travers, Rawleigh. grantee. 300 acres on the south side of Rappa: River, about 2 miles southerly into ye. woods from ye. plantation of Mr. James Bagnal.
Source: Land Office Patents No. 3, 1652-1655, p. 28 (Reel 2).
Part of the index to the recorded copies of patents for land issued by the Secretary of the Colony serving as the colonial Land Office. The collection is housed in the Archives at the Library of Virginia.

https://lva.primo.exlibrisgroup.com/discovery/fulldisplay?docid=alma990008336310205756&context=L&vid=01LVA_INST:01LVA&lang=en&search_scope=MyInstitution_noAER&adaptor=Local%20Search%20Engine&tab=LibraryCatalog&query=any,contains,RaWleigh%20Travers&offset=0

memoryArtifacts.headline: Rawleigh TRAVERS LAND GRANT 15 OCT 1657
memoryArtifacts.description:
Land grant 15 October 1657.
Traverse, Rawleigh. grantee. 
Description: 300 acres on the south side of Rappahannock River about 2 miles; south.ly into the woods from the plantation of M. James Bignall.
Location: County location not given.
Source: Land Office Patents No. 4, 1655-1664, p. 295 (Reel 4).

https://lva.primo.exlibrisgroup.com/discovery/fulldisplay?docid=alma990008336340205756&context=L&vid=01LVA_INST:01LVA&lang=en&search_scope=MyInstitution_noAER&adaptor=Local%20Search%20Engine&tab=LibraryCatalog&query=any,contains,RaWleigh%20TraversE&offset=0

memoryArtifacts.headline: Raleigh TRAVERS LAND GRANT 24 OCT 1665
memoryArtifacts.description:
Land grant 24 October 1665.
Traverse, Raleigh. grantee. 
Location: Westmoreland County.
Description: 3650 acres on the south side of Potomack River bounded S. S. W. upon Potomack Creek.
Source: Land Office Patents No. 5, 1661-1666 (v.1 & 2 p.1-369), p. 521 (Reel 5).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rawleigh Travers於1622年出生在英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特聖 倫斯時，他的父親William Travisse26歲，母親Rebecca Rawleigh32歲。他於1643年與Elizabeth Cole Hussey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特被列為justice of peace。他去世於1670年5月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州里士滿享年48歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可里士滿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rawleigh Travers于1622年出生在英国哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特聖 倫斯时，他的父亲William Travisse26岁，母亲Rebecca Rawleigh32岁。他于1643年与Elizabeth Cole Hussey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特被列为justice of peace。他去世于1670年5月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州里士滿享年48岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可里士滿。

nameMeanings.name: Travers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Travis 1 and a cognate of 3 below, or a variant of Trevors, itself a variant of Trevor .
Irish (Leitrim and Donegal; of Anglo-Norman origin): variant of   Trower  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived at a crossing place, Old French travers, or a habitational name from (Le) Travers, the name of several places in various parts of France, named with this word.

variants.name: Travis
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

nameMeanings.name: Rawleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rawleigh Travers was born in 1622, in St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, his father, William Travisse, was 26 and his mother, Rebecca Rawleigh, was 32. He married Elizabeth Cole Hussey in 1643, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. In 1656, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as justice of peace in Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. He died on 14 May 1670, in Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 48, and was buried in Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rawleigh Travers est né en 1622, à St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Travisse, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Rawleigh, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cole Hussey en 1643, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. En 1656, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of peace à Lancaster, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1670, à Richmond, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Richmond, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rawleigh Travers 1622 in St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Travisse 26 und seine Mutter Rebecca Rawleigh 32. Er hat 1643 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Elizabeth Cole Hussey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1656, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of peace in Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Mai 1670 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rawleigh Travers è nato il nel 1622 nel St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, William Travisse, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Rawleigh, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cole Hussey nel 1643, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1656, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of peace nel Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Morì il 14 maggio 1670, nel Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rawleigh Traversが1622年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトスト ヘレンスで生まれた時，父William Travisseは26歳，母Rebecca Rawleighは32歳であった。1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでElizabeth Cole Husseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1656年，34歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ランカスターでの職業はjustice of peaceと記録されている。彼は1670年5月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州リチモンドで48歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコリチモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rawleigh Travers(이)가 1622년 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 스트 헬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Travisse(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Rawleigh(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Elizabeth Cole Hussey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1656년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 랭커스터에서 justice of peace이었다. 그는 1670년 5월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 리ch몽에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 리ch몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rawleigh Travers nasceu em 1622, em St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Travisse, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Rawleigh, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cole Hussey em 1643, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1656, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of peace em Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1670, em Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rawleigh Travers родился в 1622 г. в местности ст хеленс, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Travisse было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Rawleigh, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cole Hussey в 1643 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1656 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of peace в местности ланкастир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 14 мая 1670 г. в местности ричмонд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ричмонд, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rawleigh Travers nació en 1622, en St Helens, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Travisse, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Rebecca Rawleigh, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cole Hussey en 1643, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1656, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of peace en Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1670, en Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.
